$comment: Layer C for MANIFEST vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O3-flat, docs/occurs-groups.md). Inputs 0-2 are the three quantities (PIC 9(3)V9, tenths), each NUMVAL'd into its W-QTY cell. The group table is decomposed into parallel per-leaf tables: sku cells are text (never solved over), price cells constants, so each row's ROUNDED extension W-EXT(I) = W-QTY(I) * price(I) is an affine half-cent obligation over one input (ties at odd tenths), and the BIG tier splits on the affine sum of the three written cells.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 MANIFEST (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-manifest)
